calendar.matters:
PETITION Notice Of Petition And Petition For Escheated Property
Off Calendar Jul-30-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Paul Melbostad for Alexander Melimuk (Petitioner).

Mr. Melbostad submitted the original marriage license (exhibit G) and the original death certificate of the decedent's father Max Goldstein (exhibit S) which the Court reviewed. All exhibits were returned to Mr. Melbostad. The Court will grant the petition upon review of the order.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bonner.

PETITION Notice Of Petition And Petition For Escheated Property
Off Calendar Jul-16-2008 Continued To Jul-30-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
